programmes.show_description: How news bulletins used to look. The GREAT! network takes you back in time, remembering stories from this week back then.
Mid-air action with Tia Carrere. After a freak solar flare kills the pilot and disables the systems on board, a passenger and a flight attendant must take the controls and find a safe landing. (2012)
Whilst investigating the death of a fellow antique dealer Mannering uncovers a plan to flood Scotland with counterfeit money after spotting a stolen ring on one of the gang behind the plot.
Can Steed and the team discover the identity of the person who seemingly holds a grudge against them before it is too late ?
Join officers from New Zealand Police as they patrol the streets and race to the scene of real-life emergency calls.
WWII spy thriller with Christopher Plummer. Loosely based on a true story, bank robber Eddie Chapman gets entangled in spying for both sides during World War Two, becoming a triple agent. (1967)
Join officers from New Zealand Police as they patrol the streets and race to the scene of real-life emergency calls.
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
The Avengers investigate when the directors of a construction company are murdered one-by-one. Among the clues: an oversized footprint, a magic wand and a clown mask. Can they solve the case?
Following an anonymous phone call, Steed and Tara witness a murder committed by a killer who has no recollection of their actions.
Fay Dayton, a widow whose husband once owned the Cannon's ranch, hires a fast gun to drive the Cannons off the land.
War drama starring John Mills. A WWII British submarine crew closes in on a deadly new German battleship. Just as they're ready to sink it, they run out of fuel (1943).
How news bulletins used to look. The GREAT! network takes you back in time, remembering stories from this week back then.

An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
The future of the ranch is jeopardised when bandits steal a prize bull and breeding stock which Billy Blue Cannon and Manolito Montoya have bought in Mexico with the last of the Cannon money.
An assassination attempt on an art student at the Cote d'Azur airport leads Brett and Danny to a criminal syndicate smuggling gold in the form of counterfeit coins.
Having unearthed a plot to sabotage the country's most powerful computer, The Avengers call upon its creator for help to solve the case.
Steed and Tara investigate a Nursing Academy who are reportedly developing a fatal sneezing epidemic. Can The Avengers protect the doctors as they race against time to develop an antidote?
Thrilling heist movie with Freddie Highmore and Famke Janssen. A crew of thieves plans an audacious robbery of the Bank of Spain using the World Cup final as cover. Will they hit their goal? (2021)

True crime story with Larry Lamb. A group of old-time criminals attempt to pull off the biggest heist in British history. Also starring Joely Richardson and Phil Daniels (2017).

True crime story with Larry Lamb. A group of old-time criminals attempt to pull off the biggest heist in British history. Also starring Joely Richardson and Phil Daniels (2017).
Mannering comes up against a rival antiques dealer when a long-lost antique sword resurfaces. In the race to obtain the treasure only one of them plays by the rules and it's not Arkin.
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Western starring John Wayne, Maureen O'Hara and Patrick Wayne. A wealthy rancher must navigate warring factions in the Wild West while also fighting to save his troubled marriage. (1963)

Western with Bill Williams. A former Confederate soldier and a Union officer journey a herd of cattle across America, fighting Apaches and bandits along the way (1955).
How news bulletins used to look. The GREAT! network takes you back in time, remembering stories from this week back then.
Western with Bill Williams. A former Confederate soldier and a Union officer journey a herd of cattle across America, fighting Apaches and bandits along the way (1955).
A drifter is baited into a fight with three wild brothers, wounding one, before courting their sister.
A $10,000 reward is placed on Sheriff Hollister's head after he guns down the son of a rich rancher in self-defence.
Mistakes of an inexperienced eastern bank clerk who attempts to settle on a ramshackle ranch near the Cannon family threaten to wipe out the cattle industry of the territory.
Judge Fulton sends Brett and Danny to the aid of Jenny Lindley, whose supposedly long dead brother has suddenly reappeared to wrest possession of the family estate from her.
Steed is under house arrest on suspicion of leaking secrets from the Carmadoc research institute. Can Tara and her new, hapless partner unearth the real traitor and prove Steed's innocence?
Steed and Tara investigate the deaths of secret agents attached to Cypher HQ. Can The Avengers determine whether the case is linked to leaked Top Secret information?
Keanu Reeves stars in this sci-fi thriller as a researcher trying to shield the discovery of a new power source from the US government. Morgan Freeman co-stars. (1996)
